title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules derived from Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei's publicly available statements on what is worth building with Claude. These rules aim to help individuals and businesses avoid building the wrong products, whether for side projects, startups, or operational improvements.
